mapper.update: update answer set diet_info=#{dietInfo}, statement_url=#{statementUrl}, time_management=#{timeManagement}, social_expression=#{socialExpression}, study_or_work_time=#{studyOrWorkTime}, study_or_work_state=#{studyOrWorkState}, free=#{free}, free_symptom=#{freeSymptom}, yesterday_night=#{yesterdayNight}, yesterday_end_feel=#{yesterdayEndFeel}, communicate_time=#{communicateTime}, phone_play_time=#{phonePlayTime}, weakup_status=#{weakupStatus} where user_id = #{userId} and log_date=#{logDate}
mapper.select: select * from answer where user_id=#{userId} ORDER BY id DESC
